description: Create comprehensive domain architecture comparison diagram for HSPA12A/B vs canonical HSP70
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 10))

# Create a comprehensive domain comparison diagram
y_positions = {'HSPA8': 7, 'HSPA1A': 5.5, 'HSPA12A': 3.5, 'HSPA12B': 2}

# Color scheme
nbd_color = '#4CAF50'
sbd_beta_color = '#FF9800'
sbd_alpha_color = '#F44336'
linker_color = '#9C27B0'
n_ext_color = '#9E9E9E'
ctail_color = '#795548'

for prot, y in y_positions.items():
    if prot in ['HSPA8', 'HSPA1A']:
        total_len = 646 if prot == 'HSPA8' else 641
        scale = 646 / total_len
        
        # NBD
        ax.barh(y, 380*scale, left=0, height=0.6, color=nbd_color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax.text(190*scale, y, 'NBD\n(1-380)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
        
        # Linker
        ax.barh(y, 14*scale, left=380*scale, height=0.6, color=linker_color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        
        # SBDβ
        ax.barh(y, 114*scale, left=394*scale, height=0.6, color=sbd_beta_color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax.text(451*scale, y, 'SBDβ', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
        
        # SBDα
        ax.barh(y, (total_len-508)*scale, left=508*scale, height=0.6, color=sbd_alpha_color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax.text(575*scale, y, 'SBDα/lid', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
        
        # Motif markers
        ax.plot(12*scale, y+0.35, 'v', color='darkgreen', markersize=8)
        ax.text(12*scale, y+0.55, 'IDLGTTYS', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
        
        ax.plot(202*scale, y+0.35, 'v', color='darkgreen', markersize=8)
        ax.text(202*scale, y+0.55, 'DLGGGTFD', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
        
        ax.plot(392*scale, y+0.35, 'v', color='purple', markersize=8)
        ax.text(392*scale, y+0.55, 'DLLLLD', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='purple', fontweight='bold')
        
        # Checkmarks
        ax.text(total_len*scale + 10, y, '✓ All HSP70\n  motifs present\n✓ SBD present\n✓ Pfam PF00012', 
                fontsize=7, va='center', color='green', fontweight='bold')
        
    else:  # HSPA12A or HSPA12B
        total_len = 675 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 686
        scale = 646 / total_len
        n_ext_end = 56 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 60
        nbd_start = 57 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 61
        nbd_end = 523 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 528
        
        # N-terminal extension
        ax.barh(y, n_ext_end*scale, left=0, height=0.6, color=n_ext_color, 
                edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, hatch='///')
        ax.text(n_ext_end/2*scale, y, 'N-ext', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6)
        
        # Divergent NBD
        ax.barh(y, (nbd_end-nbd_start)*scale, left=nbd_start*scale, height=0.6, 
                color='#81C784', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax.text((nbd_start+nbd_end)/2*scale, y, f'Divergent NBD\n({nbd_start}-{nbd_end})', 
                ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
        
        # C-terminal (non-SBD)
        ax.barh(y, (total_len-nbd_end)*scale, left=nbd_end*scale, height=0.6, 
                color=ctail_color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, hatch='xxx')
        ax.text((nbd_end+total_len)/2*scale, y, 'C-tail\n(no SBD)', 
                ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, color='white', fontweight='bold')
        
        # Diverged motif markers
        dfg_pos = 63 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 66
        ax.plot(dfg_pos*scale, y+0.35, 'v', color='red', markersize=8)
        ax.text(dfg_pos*scale, y+0.55, f'DFGTT\n(≠DLGTT)', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='red', fontweight='bold')
        
        dxggg_pos = 317 if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 322
        dxggg_label = 'DSGGG' if prot == 'HSPA12A' else 'DCGGG'
        ax.plot(dxggg_pos*scale, y+0.35, 'v', color='red', markersize=8)
        ax.text(dxggg_pos*scale, y+0.55, f'{dxggg_label}\n(≠DLGGG)', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='red', fontweight='bold')
        
        # X marks
        ax.text(total_len*scale + 10, y, '✗ HSP70 motifs\n  diverged\n✗ No SBD\n✗ No Pfam PF00012', 
                fontsize=7, va='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Labels
for prot, y in y_positions.items():
    ax.text(-30, y, prot, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
            fontfamily='monospace')

# Title
ax.set_title('Domain Architecture Comparison: Canonical HSP70 vs HSPA12 Subfamily\n'
             'HSPA12A/B lack substrate-binding domain and have diverged ATPase motifs',
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=nbd_color, edgecolor='black', label='Canonical NBD'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#81C784', edgecolor='black', label='Divergent NBD'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=sbd_beta_color, edgecolor='black', label='SBDβ (substrate binding)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=sbd_alpha_color, edgecolor='black', label='SBDα (lid)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=linker_color, edgecolor='black', label='Interdomain linker'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=n_ext_color, edgecolor='black', label='N-terminal extension'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=ctail_color, edgecolor='black', label='C-terminal (non-SBD)'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=4, fontsize=8, 
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.08))

# Dividing line
ax.axhline(y=4.5, color='black', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
ax.text(320, 4.7, '── Canonical HSP70 ──', ha='center', fontsize=8, style='italic', alpha=0.5)
ax.text(320, 4.2, '── HSPA12 subfamily (divergent) ──', ha='center', fontsize=8, style='italic', alpha=0.5)

ax.set_xlim(-100, 750)
ax.set_ylim(1, 8.5)
ax.set_xlabel('Position (scaled)', fontsize=10)
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/domain_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain comparison figure saved.")
